name: Rakadetyo Alif
title: Data Scientist · Software Engineer Manager
bio: Adaptable and proficient Data Scientist with hands-on experience in the tech industry. Demonstrated ability to excel in diverse roles, including those of a Data Scientist, Data Analyst, and Backend Development. Proficient in applying advanced data analysis techniques to uncover valuable insights guiding strategic planning. Skilled in backend development using Django & NodeJS, enabling the creation of robust and efficient applications. Adept at overseeing projects from inception to completion, ensuring timely delivery aligned with business objectives.
